raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The number of seniors aged 65+ living in poverty is on the rise according to the U.S. Census.",
    "In early 2023, the poverty rate was notably higher for seniors (15.2%) compared to children (13.8%) and adults aged 18–64 (12.6%) according to the Public Policy Institute of California.",
    "Rising housing costs are adding an extra burden on seniors who are on fixed incomes.",
    "The Basic Income Pilot Program aims to alleviate financial burdens on seniors living in poverty in California.",
    "There is hope to expand the basic income initiative to all seniors facing poverty in California if the pilot program is successful.",
    "The $5 million appropriation is a critical step towards reducing poverty among the senior population."
  ]
}
```
